name: smart-mcp
description: Intelligent MCP server activation based on context, task complexity, and resource needs

activate_when: File size exceeds 1MB and needs chunked reading
Atomic write operations across multiple files required
Need directory tree with metadata (sizes, timestamps)
Symbol definition lookup in unfamiliar codebase
Finding all implementations of an interface/trait
prefer_native_when: Known file location for the symbol

activate_when: Implementing patterns from a specific library version
Need API reference for third-party framework
Checking breaking changes between library versions
Best practices lookup for unfamiliar framework
prefer_native_when: Agent has strong built-in knowledge of the framework
General programming patterns not tied to specific library

example_1.task: Rename a React component from UserCard to ProfileCard
example_1.decision: Activate serena for cross-file rename with reference tracking
example_1.reason: Component likely imported in multiple files; need safe rename

example_2.decision: Use native Read tool, skip filesystem MCP
example_2.reason: Simple operation; MCP overhead not justified

example_3.decision: Activate context7 for up-to-date API reference
example_3.reason: NextAuth v5 has breaking changes from v4; need current docs

fallback_strategies.serena: Grep-based symbol search with manual reference tracking

cache_invalidation.serena: Invalidate on code changes in tracked files
cache_invalidation.context7: TTL-based only (library docs rarely change mid-session)
